candidates.why: Revenue component, but not full top-line because Total Revenue aggregates multiple revenue streams.
Best direct match for total top-line revenue/sales across years.
Top-line style revenue label, useful as fallback where Total Revenue may differ by year/reporting style.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for changing revenue labels; Total Revenue is the primary total top-line row, with Net Sales as fallback.

candidates.why: Candidate for direct production cost, but appears not applicable/populated for this company.

candidates.why: Potential SG&A component, but not clearly populated in preview.
Clear overhead/administrative component of SG&A.
Explicit SG&A row and populated in preview; per rule this should be preferred over components when present.

Not an expense row and not valid for SG&A expense mapping.

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit populated SG&A row, following the SG&A hierarchy rule. Excluded Administrative Expenses because an explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; useful fallback when specific interest expense is missing.
Similar concept but appears empty and less reliable than other choices.
Best direct match for interest expense; preferred primary choice.
Finance-related but explicitly 'other', so not preferred for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related but supplemental and partial, not full company interest expense.

variables.notes: Using priority list: specific Interest Expense first, then broader Financial Expenses as fallback for years where the specific line is absent.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total owner equity.
Equity component only, not a complete book equity measure.
Best match for parent/common shareholders' equity and excludes minority interest where separately disclosed.
This is minority interest, not book equity attributable to owners.
Includes minority interest when separately disclosed, so inferior to Shareholder's Equity for BE.

variables.notes: Selected Shareholder's Equity because minority interest is separately disclosed; this avoids double counting when MIB is added separately.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation item, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Best balance-sheet match for minority/non-controlling interests.
Also a direct match; useful fallback/alternate wording.
Income statement allocation item, not the preferred balance-sheet equity line.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet minority-interest labels as priority list; these capture non-controlling interests and align with BE exclusion of MIB.
